one_line_thesis: Cyclical InP/GaAs substrate supplier recovering from 2023 trough; AI optical demand and Coherent/Casela contracts support mid-cycle normalization, but China/Tongmei complexity, customer concentration, dilution, and negative spot owner cash keep us at watch pending return math.

deep_dive.executive_summary: AXT is a cyclical specialty-substrate supplier levered to InP demand from datacenter and AI optical interconnect markets. FY2025 was a loss year (gross margin 12.7%, operating cash flow -$12.8 million), but Q1 2026 shows revenue acceleration and margin recovery. Recent Coherent and Casela long-term InP supply agreements validate end-market pull. The balance sheet carries $57.9 million in cash and restricted cash at March 31, 2026, partially offset by Tongmei PE redemption rights of roughly $49 million after the STAR Market IPO withdrawal. At $45.86 (Yahoo close 2026-07-17), the weighted syn...

components.label: Specialty substrate manufacturing (InP, GaAs, Ge) at mid-cycle utilization
components.ownership_claim: Specialty substrate manufacturing (InP, GaAs, Ge) at mid-cycle utilization
components.evidence: FY2021–2022 operating income ~$13M on ~$140M revenue; Q1 2026 revenue run-rate ~$108M with 29.6% gross margin; Coherent 6-inch InP supply agreement (8-K 2026-06-26) and Casela 2027 InP commitment (8-K 2026-06-17)

components.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

components.label: Tongmei Hong Kong listing option (STAR Market withdrawn July 2026)
components.ownership_claim: Tongmei Hong Kong listing option (STAR Market withdrawn July 2026)
components.evidence: Tongmei withdrew STAR Market IPO July 8, 2026; pivot to HK listing (8-K 2026-07-08). Prior PE investment RMB 324M (~$49M). Listing outcome uncertain.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: HK listing application per 8-K 2026-07-08; base realization 3 years

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Probability-weighted; zero in Lawrence consolidated owner-cash path
components.falsifier: HK listing fails or PE redemptions drain parent cash before listing

components.label: Tongmei private-equity redemption rights (~$49M gross)
components.evidence: Eleven PE funds invested RMB 324,404,508 (~$49M) in Tongmei; STAR withdrawal triggers redemption rights at original investment (8-K 2026-07-08)
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: High case assumes funds roll into HK listing; base assumes partial redemption
components.falsifier: The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.

components.evidence: Shares outstanding rose from ~43.5M (Q1 2025) to 65.4M (May 2026) after Dec 2025 and Apr 2026 offerings (424B5, 8-K filings)
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: S-3ASR shelf remains active; further dilution possible
components.falsifier: The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.

method_fit.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AXT Inc., including specialty substrate operations, consolidated gallium raw materials, cash, Tongmei listing option, and PE redemption/dilution reserves.
economic_claim.unit_source: 65,423,184 common shares outstanding May 4, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026 cover page)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating substrate value, cash, and real options are additive; PE redemption and dilution reserves are liability components; gallium vertical integration is embedded in substrate operations to avoid double-counting.

timeline.label: Tongmei withdrew STAR Market IPO application; pivoted to Hong Kong listing plan; triggered ~$49M PE redemption rights
Signed 3-year Master Development and Supply Agreement with Coherent for 6-inch InP wafer substrates
Tongmei signed long-term InP supply agreement with Casela for calendar 2027 volume commitment
Completed ~8.56M share equity offering; proceeds primarily to fund Tongmei InP capacity expansion
Completed equity offering (~$87M gross before fees) to support Tongmei capacity build
Tongmei received China export permits for indium phosphide substrates; resumed shipments to additional customers
FY2024 revenue recovered to $99.4M from 2023 trough $75.8M; still reported operating loss
Cycle trough: revenue $75.8M, operating loss $21.6M after 2022 peak revenue $141.1M
Prior cycle peak: revenue $141.1M, operating income $12.6M
Strong cycle year: revenue $137.4M, operating income $12.9M

industry.structure: Specialty compound semiconductor substrates (InP, GaAs, Ge) serve niches where silicon fails; manufacturing is capital-intensive with vertical integration in raw gallium. Industry is oligopolistic but competitive, with China-based cost advantages and export-policy sensitivity.
industry.share_shift: AXT is gaining InP relevance via AI/datacenter optical demand and new supply agreements (Coherent, Casela), but customer concentration (67% top five) shows share is concentrated in a few large buyers rather than broad diversification.
industry.trend: AI-driven high-speed optical interconnect is increasing InP substrate demand; China export controls on specialty materials remain an active regulatory variable. Tongmei's shift from STAR Market to Hong Kong listing reflects evolving China capital-markets access for the operating subsidiary.

valuation_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
